Variables.Name: FOV
Variables.Description: The field of view (in degrees) in perspective mode (ignored in Orthographic mode)

Variables.Name: FirstPersonFOV
Variables.Description: The horizontal field of view (in degrees) used for primitives tagged as "IsFirstPerson".

Variables.Name: FirstPersonScale
Variables.Description: The scale to apply to primitives tagged as "IsFirstPerson". This is used to scale down primitives towards the camera such that they are small enough not to intersect with the scene.

Variables.Name: OrthoWidth
Variables.Description: The desired width (in world units) of the orthographic view (ignored in Perspective mode)

Variables.Name: OrthoNearClipPlane
Variables.Description: The near plane distance of the orthographic view (in world units)

Variables.Name: OrthoFarClipPlane
Variables.Description: The far plane distance of the orthographic view (in world units)

Variables.Name: PostProcessBlendWeight
Variables.Description: Indicates if PostProcessSettings should be applied.

Variables.Name: PostProcessSettings
Variables.Description: Post-process settings to use if PostProcessBlendWeight is non-zero.

Variables.Name: OffCenterProjectionOffset
Variables.Description: Off-axis  off-center projection offset as proportion of screen dimensions
